---
title: SourceMapDevToolPlugin
description: Fine-grained control over source map generation
---

Enables fine-grained control over source map generation. This is an alternative to the `devtool` configuration option with more flexibility.

## Usage

```js
const webpack = require('webpack');

module.exports = {
  // Don't use devtool when using SourceMapDevToolPlugin
  // devtool: false,
  plugins: [
    new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
      filename: '[file].map'
    })
  ]
};
```

<Warning>
  Don't use the `devtool` option together with `SourceMapDevToolPlugin`. The `devtool` option adds this plugin automatically.
</Warning>

## Constructor

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin(options);
```

## Options

<ParamField path="filename" type="string | null | false">
  The filename of the source map. Supports webpack template strings:
  - `[file]`: Replaced by the filename of the original asset
  - `[filebase]`: Replaced by the basename of the original asset
  - `[name]`: Replaced by the name of the chunk
  - `[id]`: Replaced by the id of the chunk
  - `[chunkhash]`: Replaced by the hash of the chunk
  - `[contenthash]`: Replaced by the content hash

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    filename: '[file].map',  // Creates main.js.map
    filename: 'sourcemaps/[file].map',  // In subdirectory
    filename: null  // Inline source map
  });
  ```

  - If `null` or not provided: Source map is inlined as DataURL
  - If `false`: No source map file is generated (used with `append`)
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="append" type="string | function | false">
  Appends a comment to the original asset. Supports placeholders:
  - `[url]`: Replaced by the URL to the source map file
  - `[map]`: Replaced by the source map content (for inline maps)

  Default: `"\n//# sourceMappingURL=[url]"`

  ```js
  // Default behavior
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    filename: '[file].map',
    append: '\n//# sourceMappingURL=[url]'
  });

  // Custom comment
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    filename: '[file].map',
    append: '\n//@ sourceMappingURL=[url]'
  });

  // Inline source map
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    filename: null,
    append: '\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,[map]'
  });

  // Function
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    append: (pathData) => {
      return `\n//# sourceMappingURL=${pathData.url}`;
    }
  });

  // Don't append comment
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    filename: '[file].map',
    append: false
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="moduleFilenameTemplate" type="string">
  Template string for naming sources in the source map.

  Default: `"webpack://[namespace]/[resourcePath]"`

  Available placeholders:
  - `[namespace]`: Module namespace
  - `[resourcePath]`: Path to the module
  - `[absoluteResourcePath]`: Absolute path
  - `[all-loaders]`: Loader names
  - `[hash]`: Module hash

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    moduleFilenameTemplate: 'webpack://[namespace]/[resource-path]?[loaders]'
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="fallbackModuleFilenameTemplate" type="string">
  Template string used when `moduleFilenameTemplate` produces duplicates.

  Default: `"webpack://[namespace]/[resourcePath]?[hash]"`

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    fallbackModuleFilenameTemplate: 'webpack://[namespace]/[resourcePath]?[hash]'
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="namespace" type="string">
  Namespace prefix for `moduleFilenameTemplate`.

  Default: `""`

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    namespace: 'my-app'
  });
  // Results in: webpack://my-app/src/index.js
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="module" type="boolean" default={true}>
  Include module information in the source map. When `false`, generates a simpler source map without module details.

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    module: false  // Simpler, faster source maps
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="columns" type="boolean" default={true}>
  Include column mappings in the source map. When `false`, generates line-only mappings (faster, smaller maps).

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    columns: false  // Faster, smaller source maps
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="noSources" type="boolean" default={false}>
  When `true`, the `sourcesContent` field is removed from the source map, making it smaller but requiring the original source files to be available.

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    noSources: true  // Don't include source content
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="publicPath" type="string">
  Public path for the source map files. Used to compute the `sourceMappingURL` comment.

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    filename: 'sourcemaps/[file].map',
    publicPath: 'https://cdn.example.com/'
  });
  // Results in: //# sourceMappingURL=https://cdn.example.com/sourcemaps/main.js.map
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="fileContext" type="string">
  Context for the `[file]` placeholder. Makes the file path relative to this directory.

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    fileContext: 'src'
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="sourceRoot" type="string">
  Value for the `sourceRoot` field in the source map.

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    sourceRoot: '/'
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="test" type="string | RegExp | Array<string | RegExp>">
  Include source maps for modules matching the test.

  Default: `/(\.(c|m)?js|css)($|\?)/i`

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    test: /\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$/
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="include" type="string | RegExp | Array<string | RegExp>">
  Include source maps for modules matching these conditions.

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    include: /\.js$/
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="exclude" type="string | RegExp | Array<string | RegExp>">
  Exclude source maps for modules matching these conditions.

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    exclude: /node_modules/
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="ignoreList" type="string | RegExp | Array<string | RegExp>">
  Patterns for sources that should be added to the `ignoreList` field in the source map. Browser dev tools can use this to hide these sources.

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    ignoreList: /node_modules/
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

<ParamField path="debugIds" type="boolean" default={false}>
  Add a `debugId` field to the source map for better debugging.

  ```js
  new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
    debugIds: true
  });
  ```
</ParamField>

## Examples

### Basic Source Maps

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
  filename: '[file].map'
});
```

### Inline Source Maps

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
  filename: null  // Inline as data URL
});
```

### External Source Maps with Custom Path

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
  filename: 'sourcemaps/[file].map',
  publicPath: 'https://cdn.example.com/',
  fileContext: 'src'
});
```

### Production Source Maps (without source content)

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
  filename: '[file].map',
  noSources: true,
  columns: false  // Faster generation
});
```

### Only for Specific Files

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
  filename: '[file].map',
  test: /\.(js|jsx)$/,
  exclude: /node_modules/
});
```

### Hide Vendor Code in DevTools

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
  filename: '[file].map',
  ignoreList: /node_modules/  // Hide from browser debugger
});
```

### Content Hash for Caching

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
  filename: '[file].[contenthash].map',
  append: '\n//# sourceMappingURL=[url]'
});
```

### Custom Source Paths

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
  filename: '[file].map',
  moduleFilenameTemplate: '[resource-path]',
  fallbackModuleFilenameTemplate: '[resource-path]?[hash]',
  namespace: 'my-library'
});
```

## Comparison with devtool

Instead of using `devtool: 'source-map'`, you can use:

```js
new webpack.SourceMapDevToolPlugin({
  filename: '[file].map',
  module: true,
  columns: true
});
```

The plugin provides more granular control over:
- Where source maps are written
- How sources are named
- What gets included/excluded
- Source map content and size

## Performance Considerations

- Set `columns: false` for faster builds (line-only mappings)
- Use `module: false` for simpler source maps
- Set `noSources: true` for smaller source maps in production
- Use `test` and `exclude` to limit source map generation
- Consider using `EvalSourceMapDevToolPlugin` for faster development builds
